subject: fix(graph): auto-contrast node text color based on background luminance
body:
White text was hardcoded for node labels, causing poor readability on
lighter palette colors (amber, yellow, light green). Added luminance-
based contrast helper that picks white or dark text per-node. Fixes
stale comment about neutral node backgrounds.

Tags: graph, cytoscape, accessibility, contrast
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: graph-styling
Semver: patch

title: auto-contrast node text color based on background luminance
